summary: Iteration 150: Verified Camera Diagnostics feature - Frontend UI tests passed, Backend API only exists in Express (desktop-app/local-server), not in Python FastAPI web backend (expected 404).

minor.issue: Returns 404 on web preview - EXPECTED behavior as endpoint only exists in Express backends (desktop-app, local-server), not Python FastAPI

critical_code_review_comments: Express /api/camera-check endpoint (lines 401-497) correctly implements: ffmpeg check, URL parsing, TCP port scan (80, 554, 443, 8080), HTTP snapshot test, Hindi diagnosis messages
parseRtspUrl function (lines 65-76) correctly handles 3 URL formats: user:pass@host:port, user@host:port, host:port
Frontend diagnoseCam function (line 1641) correctly calls /api/camera-check with URL encoding and 30s timeout
Diagnose button has correct data-testid='camera-diagnose-btn' and orange styling (bg-orange-700)
Result panel has correct data-testid='camera-diagnose-result' and shows URL Parse, Network, Ports, ffmpeg, Snapshot info
Button correctly disabled when no URL entered (disabled={diagLoading || (!frontUrl && !sideUrl)})
Error handling gracefully shows 'Diagnose Error' with error message when API fails (expected on web preview)

success_rate.backend: N/A - /api/camera-check only exists in Express backends, not Python FastAPI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Camera Diagnostics feature verified. Key points: 1) /api/camera-check endpoint ONLY exists in desktop-app and local-server Express backends, NOT in Python FastAPI web backend - this is by design for desktop/local Electron environment. 2) Frontend UI correctly shows Diagnose Camera button in Settings > Camera > IP Camera mode. 3) Button is orange colored, disabled when no URL, enabled when URL entered. 4) Result panel shows error state on web preview (404) which is expected. 5) Express endpoint logic verified: checks ffmpeg, parses URL, scans TCP ports (80, 554, 443, 8080), tests HTTP snapshot, returns Hindi diagnosis messages.

features_tested.diagnose_button_visibility: PASS - Button visible in Settings > Camera > IP Camera mode with data-testid='camera-diagnose-btn'
features_tested.diagnose_button_disabled_state: PASS - Button disabled when no URL entered
features_tested.diagnose_button_enabled_state: PASS - Button enabled when URL entered
features_tested.diagnose_button_styling: PASS - Button has orange color (bg-orange-700 hover:bg-orange-600)
features_tested.diagnose_result_panel: PASS - Result panel appears with data-testid='camera-diagnose-result'
features_tested.diagnose_error_handling: PASS - Shows 'Diagnose Error: Request failed with status code 404' on web preview (expected)
features_tested.express_endpoint_code_review: PASS - /api/camera-check endpoint correctly implements all diagnostic checks
features_tested.url_parsing_logic: PASS - parseRtspUrl handles rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.31.65:554/stream2 correctly (ip=192.168.31.65, port=554, user=admin)

mocked_features.camera_check_api: Only available in desktop-app/local-server Express backends, not Python FastAPI web backend
